title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Noise Canceling Headphones
shortDescription: Industry-leading noise cancellation with auto noise canceling.
fullDescription: The WH-1000XM5 headphones rewrite the rules for distraction-free listening. Two processors control 8 microphones for unprecedented noise cancellation and exceptional call quality. With up to 30 hours of battery life and quick charging, you'll have enough power for long trips.

title: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II
shortDescription: Wireless, bluetooth, world's best noise cancelling in-ear headphones.
fullDescription: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II represent the next generation of wireless listening. Experience the best in sound, noise cancellation, and personalized fit. Enjoy personalized sound that adjusts to your ears.

title: YETI Rambler 20 oz Tumbler
shortDescription: Stainless steel, vacuum insulated, with MagSlider lid.
fullDescription: Any tumbler that's coming along for the ride needs to be tough enough to keep up. The Rambler 20 oz. is made from durable stainless steel with double-wall vacuum insulation to protect your hot or cold beverage at all costs.

title: Fitbit Charge 6 Fitness Tracker
shortDescription: Health tracker with Google apps, heart rate on equipment, and 7-day battery.
fullDescription: Fitbit Charge 6 is a premium fitness tracker that features integrated Google Maps and Google Wallet, along with advanced heart rate sensors and stress tracking. See your physical readiness score and track over 40 exercise modes.
cons: Premium subscription required for advanced metrics

title: Ninja AF101 Air Fryer
shortDescription: Crisps, roasts, reheats, and dehydrates, for quick, easy meals.
fullDescription: Meet the Ninja Air Fryer, a fast and easy way to cook your favorite foods. Cook and crisp your favorite foods, like 2 lbs. of French fries, using little to no oil in a family-sized 4-quart basket.

title: Hydro Flask Standard Mouth Water Bottle
fullDescription: The TempShield double wall vacuum insulation keeps beverages cold up to 24 hours and hot up to 12 hours. Made with 18/8 pro-grade stainless steel to ensure pure taste and no flavor transfer.
cons: Standard mouth is harder to add ice

title: Anker PowerCore 10000 Portable Charger
shortDescription: One of the smallest and lightest 10000mAh external batteries.
fullDescription: Incredibly small and light for its large capacity. It can charge a phone over three times and most tablets once. Weighs as little as a can of soup yet delivers massive power.

title: Keurig K-Mini Single Serve Coffee Maker
fullDescription: The Keurig K-Mini brewer features a sleek design with matte finish, and at less than 5 inches wide is the perfect size for any space or occasion. Simply add fresh water to the reservoir, pop in your favorite K-Cup pod, press the brew button and enjoy fresh brewed, delicious coffee in minutes.
cons: Only brews one cup at a time
Must refill water for every cup
